title: Animation Steps, after, Pause, Speed, and Cancellation
description: The solver sleeps inside a callback, recursively calls update, schedules duplicate timers, and reset leaves old animation mutating new state. Learners cumulatively produce cancellable event-loop animation scheduler through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Expose generation and solving as bounded state transitions or iterator steps independent from presentation timing.
Schedule one future callback with after and retain its identifier and owning run generation.
Pause without losing algorithm state, resume once, and apply changed speed to future turns predictably.
